title: SurveyPayload
description: Payload submitted by IConnector.sendSurvey() at the end of a conversation. Source: packages/core/src/domain/ports/IConnector.ts.

comment.description: Optional free-text comment. Required when rating <= theme.endOfConversationSurvey.requireCommentBelow.

kind.description: Opaque identifier propagated from theme.endOfConversationSurvey.kind. DirectLine uses this as the numeric `type` field.
